subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: The history of Mount Carmel is holy history. A spiritual atmosphere surrounds this 'Mountain of God.' Elijah and Jesus spent part of their precious lives upon it.
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @future of Haifa; of the Holy Land, @Shrines and Holy places, @universal education, @prophecy and fulfillment
